title: The Rainbow World 2
description: The Rainbow World 2 is a continuation of the old mod "The Rainbow World" which adds various items and blocks from the game "Nyan Cat" to Minecraft!
body:
🌈 The Rainbow World

The Rainbow World 2 is a continuation of the old mod "The Rainbow World" which adds various items and blocks from the game "Nyan Cat" to Minecraft! In the fashion there are rainbow tools and diamonds, as well as nyan armor and ore!

💬 Supported languages

  • English (US)
  • Русский

💾 Supported mod loaders

  • Forge
